# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

# Initial Implementation

FROM node:14-alpine

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y build-essential git curl wget unzip zip libssl-dev libffi-dev openssl libxml2-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev libncurses5-dev libreadline-dev libsqlite3-dev libtk8.6-dev tk8.6 libncursesw5-dev

RUN npm config set strict-ssl false
RUN npm install -g yarn

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./

RUN npm install --production

COPY . .

CMD ["node", "index.js"]
